overview: MS Sports is an ultra-premium, cinematic website for Lucknow's top tennis cricket bat shop. Features a full-screen hero with parallax effects, interactive product showcase, 5-star testimonial carousel, and sticky conversion CTAs (WhatsApp, Call, Visit Store) to turn every visitor into a customer.
features: Full-screen cinematic hero with parallax scroll and animated tagline
Sticky navigation with WhatsApp, Call, and Visit Store CTAs
First-time visitor 10% discount pop-up with localStorage persistence
Interactive product grid for 5 categories with hover effects and WhatsApp inquiry buttons
About / Why MS Sports section with 5 animated USP icons
Testimonial carousel with auto-rotation and manual navigation
Contact form with success toast and embedded map for Lucknow location
Warm sporty color palette with premium rounded design
